comprehensiveInputValidation: Server-Side Validation: Always validate inputs on the server side
Client-Side Validation: Implement for user experience, not security
Type Validation: Enforce strict data type requirements
Length Validation: Set appropriate minimum and maximum lengths
Format Validation: Use regex patterns for structured data (email, phone, etc.)
Whitelist Approach: Prefer whitelisting valid inputs over blacklisting

sanitizationStrategies.title: Sanitization Requirements
items: HTML encoding for web output contexts
URL encoding for URL parameters and paths
Command injection prevention for system calls

contextAwareEncoding: HTML Context: Use HTML entity encoding
JavaScript Context: Use JavaScript string escaping
CSS Context: Use CSS value encoding
SQL Context: Use parameterized queries exclusively

strongAuthenticationMechanisms: Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA): Implement MFA for sensitive accounts
Password Policies: Enforce strong password requirements
Password Hashing: Use bcrypt, Argon2, or similar secure hashing
Account Lockout: Implement account lockout after failed attempts
Session Management: Use secure session handling practices

roleBasedAccessControl.title: RBAC Implementation
items: Use hierarchical role structures where appropriate
Regularly audit and review role assignments
